title: lourteigia humilis
intro: Lourteigia humilis is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy or aster. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant contains flavonoids and other compounds that exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, which include reducing pain and improving respiratory function. Lourteigia humilis can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or extract in herbal remedies.
